handoff.reason: Rolling Phase-2 correctness batch promoted from STUB-5WVGHD with deferred phases bound to STUB-Z1ETZD, STUB-81XNNM

execution_rules.notes: Rolling plan: P1 planned; P2-P3 plan_deferred with hard_stops approved=false. Integrator lane: land to main + push per phase.

hard_constraints: Headers mirror AST ground truth; restamp @exports in the same phase as extraction changes
Integrator lane: commit to main + push per phase

decisions_log.note: fill-ladder self-pick (BQDXJ0) overridden per roadmap order: AT-BAT STUB-5WVGHD, ON-DECK STUB-Z1ETZD, IN-THE-HOLE STUB-81XNNM - mirrors this WO's phase order
manual constraint check: 14-field report untouched, additive-only scanner fix, integrator lane honored

evidence sharpened: call-resolver has ZERO constant elements (multi-line export-const Sets not extracted at all; single-line consts elsewhere are) and nested closure addEntry carries exported:true (inherit bug) - its header lists it, so the flag fix requires same-phase header restamps wherever nested fns were codified into @exports
post-phase audit: fix additive (2 methods + 1 call site in element-extractor); header restamps mechanical from index truth; no API surface change; baseline cleaner than pre-fix
Time-boxed root-cause hunt; minimal repro already in hand (any vitest import of the .mjs fails collection; plain node import works)

plan_adjustments.summary: P1 shipped: isExported scope-boundary fix + isConstantValue widening (new_expression/array/object/call_expression/template_string/as_expression/satisfies_expression, ALL_CAPS-gated). Blast radius larger than estimated: const extraction surfaced 25 under-listing @exports headers + 9 newly-visible files (coverage transiently 86.86%). Remedied in-phase: surgical @exports restamp script (one line per file, derived from fresh index.json exported elements) + populate --source-headers for the 9. Final: stale 0, export_mismatch 0, coverage 99.27% (better than pre-fix 98.86%/stale-1). Element delta: +~80 constants (126 total, 30 exported); nested exported:true count now 0.

P1-T5 gate: 1613/1614 collected tests pass. scanner-export.test.ts recursive-option timeout in full run is the documented contention-flake victim (precedent 2026-06-12 morning) - isolated rerun 25/25 PASS. check-header-coverage.test.ts collection failure is STUB-Z1ETZD, THIS WO's Phase 2 target. Gate accepted PASS-with-notes.

P2 root cause isolated by paired probes: vitest transform fails ONLY on shebang+CRLF combination (#!/usr/bin/env node
 leaves a stray  after shebang stripping -> SyntaxError at collection). Shebang-only and CRLF-only copies both pass. Fix: LF-normalize scripts/check-header-coverage.mjs + .gitattributes rule (scripts/*.mjs text eol=lf) so Windows checkouts cannot regress it. check-header-coverage.test.ts collects + passes 10/10 for the first time since at least 2026-06-12. Full suite 1623 passed, zero uncollectable files; single failure is the documented scanner-export contention flake (isolated 25/25).

communication_log.message: WO created from STUB-5WVGHD (roadmap PHASE-2.SCANNER-EXPORT-CLASSIFICATION). Rolling: P1 scanner export classification (7 tasks); P2 vitest mjs collection (STUB-Z1ETZD); P3 ghost index entries (STUB-81XNNM).
Phase 1 COMPLETE pending commit: scanner export classification fixed; header baseline fully clean for the first time (stale 0, mismatch 0, 99.27%).
Phase 2 COMPLETE: vitest mjs collection failure fixed at root (shebang+CRLF). Proceeding to Phase 3 (STUB-81XNNM ghost index entries) per operator standing approval.
